posts.title: 14-Year-Old Asks Nobel Prize for Email
posts.ig_caption:
When I was 14 years old, I met a Nobel Prize winner and I asked for his email.

Jhonatan Bringas is the MD and CEO of Lapsi Health, building AI-powered stethoscope technology to transform cardiac diagnostics.

The answer he got changed the trajectory of his career. Here's why the ask itself was already the win.

Full episode with Jhonatan Bringas 🎙️ link in bio

#NobelPrize #MedicalInnovation #FounderMindset #HealthTech
posts.yt_description:
When I was 14 years old, I met a Nobel Prize winner and I asked for his email.

Jhonatan Bringas is the MD and CEO of Lapsi Health, building AI-powered stethoscope technology to transform cardiac diagnostics.

The answer he got changed the trajectory of his career. Here's why the ask itself was already the win.

Full episode with Jhonatan Bringas 🎙️ https://medicalinnovationpod.com/episode/episode-32-listening-deeper-the-ai-stethoscope-reimagined---lapsi-health-jhonatan-bringas-dimitriades-md-ceo-of-lapsi-health/.

#NobelPrize #MedicalInnovation #FounderMindset #HealthTech
posts.tiktok_caption: A 14-year-old walked up to a Nobel Prize winner and asked for his email. What happened next? Jhonatan Bringas, CEO of Lapsi Health, explains. #NobelPrize #HealthTech #FounderStory

posts.title: Nobel Mentor for 26 Years Changed Everything
posts.ig_caption:
He asked a Nobel laureate for his email and that man mentored him for 26 years.

Jhonatan Bringas, MD and CEO of Lapsi Health, has spent decades at the intersection of science and medical innovation including a relationship with the scientist who discovered gene splicing.

What does 26 years of conversation with one of the most consequential minds in biology actually do to how you think?

Full episode with Jhonatan Bringas 🎙️ link in bio

#GeneSplicing #mRNAVaccine #MedicalInnovation #BiosciencePodcast

posts.title: Gut Feeling Is Actually Science
posts.ig_caption:
Gut feeling isn't mystical it's your brain processing what you can't put into words.

Jhonatan Bringas, MD and CEO of Lapsi Health, has built a career on high-stakes decisions in medical innovation, so when he talks about trusting instinct, he's not speaking abstractly.

He breaks down exactly why gut feeling is rational, not mystical and what that means for how you make decisions under pressure.

Full episode with Jhonatan Bringas 🎙️ link in bio

#GutIntuition #DecisionScience #MedicalInnovation #ClinicalLeadership

posts.title: Patient's Reaction to AI Stethoscope
posts.ig_caption:
The doctor turns it on, the LED lights go on and the patient says, God damn.

Jhonatan Bringas is the MD and CEO of Lapsi Health, building an AI stethoscope that documents consults and listens to your lungs at the same time.

The patient's next question told them everything they needed to know about whether this technology was actually ready for the clinic.

Full episode with Jhonatan Bringas 🎙️ link in bio

#AIStethoscope #HealthcareAI #MedicalDevices #FDACleared

posts.title: Why Nobody Wants to Fund Hardware
posts.ig_caption:
Nobody wants to invest in hardware and that almost made us more adamant to build it.

Jhonatan Bringas is the MD and CEO of Lapsi Health, building an AI-powered stethoscope in one of the hardest funding climates for medical hardware.

He explains why getting 200 doors slammed in your face might actually be the best competitive moat you can have.

Full episode with Jhonatan Bringas 🎙️ link in bio

#MedicalHardware #HealthcareStartups #MedtechFounders #StartupFundraising

posts.title: Doctor Couldn't Hear the Wheeze
posts.ig_caption:
A patient nearly died because the doctor couldn't hear the wheeze.

Jhonatan Bringas is the MD and CEO of Lapsi Health a company built around the idea that modern microphones and AI can catch what stethoscopes miss.

What happens when a doctor's ears aren't enough and the technology to fix it already exists?

Full episode with Jhonatan Bringas 🎙️ link in bio

#AIStethoscope #RespiratoryHealth #DigitalHealth #AsthmaAwareness

posts.title: Healthcare AI Is Missing Diagnostics
posts.ig_caption:
Every healthcare AI company is building the same thing and missing half the picture.

Jhonatan Bringas, MD and CEO of Lapsi Health, is building AI around the stethoscope the diagnostic side of medicine that most software companies skip entirely.

He breaks down exactly why ignoring diagnostics means you'll never capture the full value of a clinical consultation.

Full episode with Jhonatan Bringas 🎙️ link in bio

#HealthcareAI #ClinicalDiagnostics #AIinMedicine #DigitalHealth

posts.title: The Stethoscope Is Just the Beginning
posts.ig_caption:
Our end goal is bigger than just scribing and I can't tell you much yet.

Jhonatan Bringas is the MD and CEO of Lapsi Health, which built an AI stethoscope that went from hardware to a full clinical scribing platform in under a year.

He's hinting at something in stealth that turns the device into a platform and voice analysis is only part of it.

Full episode with Jhonatan Bringas 🎙️ link in bio

#AIStethoscope #ClinicalAI #DigitalHealth #VoiceAnalysis #HealthTechStartup

Full episode with Jhonatan Bringas 🎙️ https://medicalinnovationpod.com/episode/episode-32-listening-deeper-the-ai-stethoscope-reimagined---lapsi-health-jhonatan-bringas-dimitriades-md-ceo-of-lapsi-health/
posts.tiktok_caption: They built an AI stethoscope scribing was just step one. Jhonatan Bringas (Lapsi Health CEO) says what's coming next is still in stealth. #AIStethoscope #DigitalHealth #HealthTechStartup

posts.title: Hardware Is a Moat Nobody Wants
posts.ig_caption:
Every regulatory achievement becomes a valuation price point for your company.

Jhonatan Bringas is the MD and CEO of Lapsi Health, building an AI-powered stethoscope and navigating medical device regulation from the inside.

Most founders treat FDA clearance as a burden. Here's why it might be your biggest competitive advantage.

Full episode with Jhonatan Bringas 🎙️ link in bio

#MedicalDevice #HealthcareStartup #FDARegulation #AIHealthcare

posts.title: NICU Nurses Leave It in Incubators
posts.ig_caption:
NICU nurses are leaving it inside the incubators.

Jhonatan Bringas, MD and CEO of Lapsi Health, built an AI stethoscope now being used in some of the most sensitive clinical environments in medicine.

Find out why neonatologists and pediatricians are calling it one of the safest tools they've ever used and what that means for the future of bedside care.

Full episode with Jhonatan Bringas 🎙️ link in bio

#NICUCare #AIStethoscope #PediatricMedicine #DigitalHealth

posts.title: This Is the iPhone Moment for Medicine
posts.ig_caption:
What if medicine is having its iPhone moment right now?

Jhonatan Bringas, MD and CEO of Lapsi Health, is building an AI stethoscope by merging technologies that already exist the same playbook Steve Jobs used in 2007.

Watch to find out what three things he's combining, and why it could change how clinicians work forever.

Full episode with Jhonatan Bringas 🎙️ link in bio

#AIStethoscope #DigitalHealth #MedicalAI #HealthcareInnovation

posts.title: Devices Stuck in Customs, Clock Ticking
posts.ig_caption:
The devices were stuck in customs in Peru and they had one week to start.

Jhonatan Bringas, MD and CEO of Lapsi Health, is building AI stethoscope technology and running clinical trials with pediatric cardiologists in South America.

What it actually takes to get medical devices through customs and into patients' hands in time.

Full episode with Jhonatan Bringas 🎙️ link in bio

#MedicalDevices #ClinicalTrials #HealthcareInnovation #Cardiology #HealthTech

posts.title: Met His Wife Volunteering in the Mountains
posts.ig_caption:
He met his wife volunteering as a physician in the mountains of Peru giving free care to kids in one of the poorest regions in the country.

Jhonatan Bringas is a physician and CEO of Lapsi Health, reimagining how AI can power the humble stethoscope.

What happens when doing good leads to something you never planned for? This story is the setup to everything.

Full episode with Jhonatan Bringas 🎙️ link in bio

#PhysicianEntrepreneur #MedicalVolunteer #PeruHealthcare #AIinMedicine

posts.title: Wireless Charging Keeps Hospitals Safer
posts.ig_caption:
It has no USB-C plug and that was a very intentional decision.

Jhonatan Bringas is the MD and CEO of Lapsi Health, building an AI stethoscope designed specifically for clinical environments where infection control isn't optional.

Find out why removing a port can actually make a medical device more trustworthy in a hospital setting.

Full episode with Jhonatan Bringas 🎙️ link in bio

#InfectionControl #MedicalDeviceDesign #AIStethoscope #HealthcareInnovation
